GET /manifest
GET /products
GET /products/{product_id}
GET /inventory
GET /inventory/{sku}
GET /warehouses
GET /warehouses/{warehouse_id}
GET /orders
GET /orders/{order_id}
GET /customers
GET /customers/{customer_id}
GET /suppliers
GET /suppliers/{supplier_id}
GET /purchase_orders
GET /purchase_orders/{po_id}
GET /boms
GET /boms/{bom_id}
GET /incidents
GET /incidents/{incident_id}
